backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining trading analysis data types (AnalysisDirection, CandlestickPattern, ResistanceLevel, AnalysisResult with external blob storage), user settings, and public functions to store/retrieve analyses and settings per caller principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four high-confidence features related to investigating and fixing HTTP 403 errors during mobile chart image uploads, including API configuration, diagnostic logging, API key validation, and image preprocessing requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend React components and pages, describing routing, Portuguese UI text, camera/upload/clipboard input methods, processing stages, signal display (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), and error handling for the trading chart analysis application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title 'Advance Signal Pro', and script tag loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with six routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using custom useCamera hook with Portuguese UI text, supporting photo capture, retake functionality, camera switching, and error handling for permission/not-found/not-supported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance levels as dashed horizontal lines and directional trend arrows (bullish green upward, bearish red downward) overlaid on chart images retrieved from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: File upload component with drag-and-drop support that validates image formats (PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP), rejects HEIC files, and enforces a 10MB size limit.
Displays a single analysis result in the history list with signal badge, confidence percentage, timestamp, and trend direction; navigates to results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper that renders child routes, includes a toast notification system, and displays a footer with attribution to caffeine.ai.
Visual indicator component showing processing stages with checkmark for complete, spinner for active, and dot for pending states.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Reusable settings row component that displays a label, description, and control element in a horizontal layout.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays trading signal analysis results including direction (buy/sell/hold), confidence percentage, trend strength, and optional scoring with color-coded badges and icons.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Configuration file defining AI provider endpoints and documenting mandatory 6-step technical analysis requirements including candle reading, trend identification, pattern detection, and scoring system.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context provider for managing light/dark theme state with localStorage persistence and document class application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events to capture images from clipboard and handles clipboard permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating analysis results and user settings via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Wraps useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries into a simplified hook that exposes settings data, loading state, and an update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, base styles for typography and form elements, and utility classes for touch-friendly sizing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for uploading or capturing chart images via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then storing the image in sessionStorage and navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app logo, AI status indicator, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings with feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a list of previous chart analyses fetched from the backend, showing a loading state or empty state with a call-to-action to analyze a chart.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Handles chart analysis by loading the image from sessionStorage, calling an external analysis API with progress stages, storing results in the backend, and navigating to the results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page component that displays trading signal analysis with confidence metrics, trend direction, detected patterns, and special handling for 'SEM ENTRADA' (no clear signal) and 'NEUTRO' (neutral) cases. Includes share and save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component allowing users to configure theme (light/dark), AI sensitivity slider, default timeframe selection, and signal notifications toggle.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: API service for chart analysis that handles image preprocessing (resize, format conversion, HEIC detection), validates API keys, and implements retry logic with timeout handling. Includes Portuguese error messages.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript type definitions for external API responses implementing a 6-step objective rule-based technical analysis process with signal types (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), trend detection, and confidence scoring.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts bigint nanosecond timestamps to human-readable Portuguese date/time strings (e.g., '15 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps external API analysis responses to internal AnalysisResult format, converting Portuguese signal/trend strings to enum values and pattern names to CandlestickPattern types.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility for sharing analysis results using native Web Share API with fallback to clipboard copy, formatting signal data into Portuguese text.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended spacing/sizing for touch targets, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining Advance Signal Pro, a mobile app for automated financial chart analysis using external AI REST API for binary options trading on Pocket Option. Documents architecture (mobile-first, external API integration), existing features (dashboard, upload, processing, results display), known issue with mobile screenshot uploads, and comprehensive requirements for UI, analysis flow, and settings.
